title: Global Fusion Investment by Year and Source
executive_question: How has private and public investment in fusion evolved over the past decade?
required_metrics: Annual private investment in fusion (USD millions)
Annual public/government funding for fusion (USD millions)
Total cumulative investment (USD billions)
preferred_sources: DOE fusion energy science budget documents
search_queries: fusion energy private investment 2024 venture capital
data_quality_rule: Data must be sourced from official industry reports or government budgets; exclude estimates from non-authoritative blogs.

title: Projected LCOE of Fusion vs. Other Sources
executive_question: How does fusion's expected levelized cost of electricity compare to solar, wind, and fission in 2030-2050?
required_metrics: Fusion LCOE projection (USD/MWh) for 2030, 2040, 2050
Solar PV LCOE (USD/MWh) for same years
Onshore wind LCOE (USD/MWh) for same years
Nuclear fission LCOE (USD/MWh) for same years
preferred_sources: Lazard Levelized Cost of Energy Analysis
search_queries: Lazard LCOE 2024 fusion solar wind nuclear
data_quality_rule: Use only published LCOE ranges from authoritative sources; note if fusion data is absent as an evidence gap.

title: Fusion Project Progress Timeline
executive_question: When do leading fusion projects expect to achieve net energy gain and commercial operation?
required_metrics: Project name
Expected date of first plasma
Expected date of net energy gain (Q>1)
Expected date of commercial operation
Current status (e.g., under construction, design phase)
comparison_set: Major fusion projects (ITER, SPARC, Helion, TAE, etc.)
search_queries: SPARC fusion timeline net energy gain
data_quality_rule: Dates must be from official project announcements or regulatory filings; note any delays or uncertainties.

title: Regulatory Milestones for Fusion Licensing
executive_question: What are the key regulatory steps for licensing a fusion plant, and where do major projects stand?
required_metrics: Regulatory body (e.g., NRC, UK EA, IAEA)
Milestone description (e.g., pre-application, license application, safety review, construction permit, operating license)
Expected completion date
Project name associated with milestone
comparison_set: Regulatory frameworks in US, UK, Japan, and EU
preferred_sources: US Nuclear Regulatory Commission fusion licensing documents
data_quality_rule: Only include milestones from official regulatory publications or project filings; exclude speculative timelines.

title: Fusion Startup Count and Funding by Stage
executive_question: How many fusion startups exist, and what is their funding distribution by stage?
required_metrics: Number of fusion startups
Total funding per startup (USD millions)
Stage (seed, Series A, B, C, etc.)
Year founded
comparison_set: Individual startups (e.g., Commonwealth Fusion Systems, Helion, TAE, Zap Energy, etc.)
data_quality_rule: Funding data must be from verified funding announcements or regulatory filings; exclude unconfirmed rumors.
